summary: All tests PASSED for the 3-tier pricing update and new feature pages. Verified: Landing page shows 3 tiers (Free $0, Standard $39, Pro $119). Dashboard Billing page shows same 3 tiers. All 4 new feature pages load correctly: Reports, Analytics, API Keys, Branding. All pages show appropriate upgrade notices for Free plan users. Enterprise tier has been successfully removed from both Landing and Billing pages.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/billing/plans returns exactly 3 plans (free, standard, pro)
Backend: Free plan pricing is $0
Backend: Standard plan pricing is $39/annual, $49/monthly
Backend: Pro plan pricing is $119/annual, $149/monthly
Backend: Enterprise plan NOT in plans list (correctly removed)
Backend: GET /api/billing/subscription-status works
Backend: GET /api/reports/export/{type} endpoint exists for all 4 types
Backend: GET /api/analytics/dashboard returns proper data structure
Backend: GET /api/api-keys returns keys list or plan_required notice
Backend: GET /api/branding returns branding settings
Backend: All endpoints properly gate features by plan
Landing Page: Shows 3 pricing tiers (Free, Standard, Pro)
Landing Page: Monthly/Annual toggle works correctly
Landing Page: Free tier shows $0/month
Landing Page: Standard tier shows $39/month annual, $49/month monthly
Landing Page: Pro tier shows $119/month annual, $149/month monthly
Landing Page: Enterprise tier NOT displayed (correctly removed)
Landing Page: Standard plan features include Contractor Portal, Exportable reports, Tenant Screening
Landing Page: Pro plan features include Analytics, Custom branding, API access, 2FA
Dashboard Sidebar: Reports link visible
Dashboard Sidebar: Analytics link visible
Dashboard Sidebar: API Keys link visible
Dashboard Sidebar: Branding link visible
Dashboard Billing: 3 plan cards displayed (Free, Standard, Pro)
Dashboard Billing: Enterprise card NOT displayed (correctly removed)
Dashboard Billing: Upgrade buttons work for Standard and Pro
Reports Page: Loads correctly with 4 report types
Reports Page: Shows upgrade notice for Free users
Analytics Page: Loads correctly with charts and metrics
Analytics Page: Shows upgrade notice for Free users viewing sample data
API Keys Page: Loads correctly with upgrade notice for non-Pro users
Branding Page: Loads correctly with logo/color options and upgrade notice
context_for_next_testing_agent: Enterprise tier has been removed from both Landing page and Dashboard Billing page. Now showing 3 tiers: Free ($0), Standard ($39/$49), Pro ($119/$149). Four new feature pages added: Reports, Analytics, API Keys, Branding. All pages are plan-gated: Reports requires Standard+, Analytics/API Keys/Branding require Pro. Free users see upgrade notices. All backend endpoints working correctly with proper plan validation.
